$comment: Approach D — agents-first, light arc. V2 cut. Total runtime 3:00 exact. Fact-checked claims (see video-assets/citations.md). Two TTS backends supported: Chirp 3 (default, $0, ships v2) and ElevenLabs (upgrade — needs paid creator key). Pacing: speaking_rate 0.92 default; 0.88 on punchline; 0.95 on architecture. SSML pauses in cold open / hook / proof beats.

segments.visual: Pexels wildlife-coldopen.mp4 — 4K aerial elephant in dry bushland, cropped 1920x1080, -10% saturation. No text overlay.
segments.audio: Music drone -16 dBFS. Natural ambient from clip retained.

segments.visual: Single line of text superimposed on continuing wildlife footage: "Conservation is a data problem." Hold 2s, cut to black 0.5s.
Black. "733 TNFD adopters. 179 financial institutions, $22.4T AUM." Footnote tnfd.global/engage/tnfd-adopters · Nov 2025
segments.text: <speak>Seven hundred thirty-three adopters of the Taskforce on Nature-related Financial Disclosures. <break time="250ms"/> Twenty-two trillion dollars in assets under management.</speak>

segments.visual: Black. "Half of the world's largest companies still don't disclose biodiversity risk." — KPMG, Survey of Sustainability Reporting. Footnote: ~49% disclose, doubled since 2020.
segments.text: <speak>K-P-M-G's Survey of Sustainability Reporting: <break time="250ms"/> biodiversity disclosure has doubled, <break time="150ms"/> but half still don't report it.</speak>

segments.visual: GUARDIAN wordmark hold 1s, then fade into Ops Center idle wide shot, map of Africa visible.
segments.text: <speak>GUARDIAN. <break time="200ms"/> Multi-agent biodiversity defense on Google Cloud.</speak>

segments.visual: Cursor clicks Full Multimodal Chain. Mapbox flyTo from continent to Selous (1500ms). Pulsing amber pin at Tag-22. Stream Watcher card appears. Audio Agent card slides up.
segments.text: Camera-trap Tag twenty-two fires. Stream Watcher confirms a vehicle. Audio Agent flags a gunshot, point nine three confidence.

segments.visual: Species ID card. Pop-out highlights the corpus lookup row: Endangered · CITES Appendix I · TNFD material.
segments.text: Species I-D grounds the herd against the International Union for Conservation of Nature, the Convention on International Trade in Endangered Species, and the Taskforce on Nature-related Financial Disclosures. Endangered. Appendix One. Material.

segments.visual: Map pulse on Tag-22. 4 amber arrows animate from Selous to peer markers (Dar es Salaam, London-anchored Sponsor card, Geneva-anchored Funder card, Maasai Mara). Each peer ack card lands under incident panel with real IDs: PSR-9737, TNFD-2026-A0192B2A32, FUND-A0192B2A32, MUTAID-A019282A32. Lower-third overlay: "Each peer = separate Cloud Run service · github.com/odominguez7/guardian"
segments.text: The orchestrator fans out to four independent A2A peers, each a separate service: <break time="150ms"/> Park Service. <break time="100ms"/> Sponsor Sustainability. <break time="100ms"/> Funder Reporter. <break time="100ms"/> Neighbor Park.

segments.visual: Cursor clicks evidence link. Court-evidence packet opens, scroll once. SHA-256 chain hash visible. Lower-third: "BigQuery sink for full custody."
segments.text: Anchored with a Secure Hash Algorithm two-five-six signature. Tamper-evident audit trail.

segments.visual: Punchline frame — large mono TNFD-2026-A0192B2A32 centered. Top: Mapped to ESRS E4. Sub: deterministic · POST /demo/run/multimodal_pipeline · github.com/odominguez7/guardian
segments.audio: Music drops to -32 dBFS for emphasis. Drop in speaking_rate 0.88.
segments.text: <speak>This filing I-D comes from a deterministic public endpoint. <break time="300ms"/> Re-run the call <break time="150ms"/> and the same I-D comes back. <break time="250ms"/> Source on GitHub.</speak>

segments.visual: Architecture diagram slow Ken-Burns. Callouts highlight as named.
segments.text: Six Cloud Run services. One A-D-K orchestrator on Gemini two point five Pro, plus the Ops Center frontend. Four specialists. Four independent A2A peers. Species I-D grounds against the International Union for Conservation of Nature, the Convention on International Trade in Endangered Species, and the Taskforce on Nature-related Financial Disclosures, via Vertex AI Search. BigQuery audits the trail. Packaged for Marketplace.

segments.visual: $58T GDP nature · ESRS E4 where material · 4 A2A peers · Marketplace thumbnail
segments.text: Fifty-eight trillion of Gross Domestic Product depends on nature. <break time="200ms"/> The European Union's Corporate Sustainability Reporting Directive requires biodiversity disclosure under European Sustainability Reporting Standards E-four. <break time="200ms"/> GUARDIAN packaged for Google Cloud Marketplace, the channels procurement already trusts.

segments.visual: Filing-ID frame returns dimmed under producer credit overlay.
segments.text: <speak>Built by Omar Dominguez Mondragon. <break time="200ms"/> C-E-O and Founder, GuardIAn Wildlife. <break time="100ms"/> M-I-T Sloan.</speak>
